The '''Ferionic Nebula''' was in the [[Dantooine system/Legends|Dantooine system]]. It contained an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid-like]] [[Planetoid/Legends|planetoid]], nicknamed [[Dantooine's Second Star]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
